mapper.select: SELECT r.h.code, MIN(r.price) FROM room r INNER JOIN hotel h ON r.h_code = h.h_code GROUP BY r.h.code
SELECT *FROM room ORDER BY r_code DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room
roomName LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
maxOccupancy LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")

SELECT * FROM room
roomName LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
maxOccupancy LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
ORDER BY r_code DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}
mapper.update: UPDATE room SET h_code = #{h_code},roomName = #{roomName},price = #{price},maxOccupancy = #{maxOccupancy},r_img = #{r_img} WHERE r_code =#{r_code}
